metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Bernardo Rubin

plugins.name: pr-review
plugins.description: PR review with parallel agents, confidence-based filtering, incremental tracking, and file output. General-purpose, optimized for TypeScript/JavaScript.

plugins.name: claude-learn
plugins.description: Review the current session and document valuable learnings to CLAUDE.md files, making future Claude sessions smarter.

plugins.name: claude-modularize
plugins.description: Break down a large, monolithic CLAUDE.md file into smaller, maintainable pieces distributed across the project's directory structure.

plugins.name: git-acp
plugins.description: Stage all changes, generate a commit message from the diff, commit, and push to remote in one step.

plugins.name: git-pull-reapply
plugins.description: Bring the current branch up to date with remote while preserving local work — handles clean trees, uncommitted changes, and divergent branches via stash and rebase.

plugins.name: pr-description
plugins.description: Generate a GitHub-ready PR description from the diff and update the PR directly on GitHub. Falls back to saving to Desktop if the GitHub update fails.

plugins.name: prd-to-jira
plugins.description: Break down a PRD, spec, or feature document into a Jira epic with well-structured, right-sized tickets organized by work area. Includes both the slash command and the underlying skill.

plugins.name: save-session-to-worklog
plugins.description: Log the current session's work into a monthly worklog on the Desktop (e.g., april-2026-happy-worklog.md). For standups and invoicing — not git history. Auto-detects the project.

plugins.name: write-slack-message
plugins.description: Write a Slack message ready to copy-paste, with proper formatting and a business-casual tone.
